meta.name: Tiago Estetele
meta.title: Tiago Estetele | Web Developer & Front-End Specialist
meta.description: Web developer specialized in front-end, with hands-on full stack experience and ambitious about where AI is taking software engineering.

about.title: About
about.description: Web developer specialized in front-end, working remotely from Brazil since 2022. Going deeper into software architecture, back-end development, and AI engineering.

stack.title: Stack
stack.description: The technologies Tiago Estetele builds with: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, headless CMS platforms, PostgreSQL, Docker, and AI tooling.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Selected work by Tiago Estetele: corporate websites, agribusiness platforms, and creative agency sites built with React, Next.js, and WordPress.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Tiago Estetele's professional experience as a front-end and full stack developer at Brivia, Polo BPM, and OKN.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with Tiago Estetele. Open to freelance, full-time, and collaboration opportunities.

helpMenu.title: man portfolio
helpMenu.navBody: Use the tabs at the top of the window to jump between pages, or navigate like a real terminal: click anywhere and type commands. Press Enter to run them.
helpMenu.tip: tip: 'cd' into a path that doesn't exist and see what happens.

commands.desc: go to a page, e.g. cd stack

home.headline1: Building scalable web experiences and exploring the future of
home.heroSub: Web developer specialized in front-end, with hands-on full stack experience and ambitious about where AI is taking software engineering.
home.hint: tip: navigate with the tabs above, or type commands. try 'help'.

about.p1: I'm a web developer, specialized in front-end, who cares about the details: clean architecture, fast interfaces, and code that other people enjoy maintaining. Since 2022 I've been working remotely from Brazil, shipping products with React, Next.js and headless CMS stacks.
about.p2: Right now I'm going deeper: software architecture, back-end development, and AI engineering. I believe the best interfaces of the next decade will be built by people who understand the whole system.

stack.subtext: Carefully chosen technologies for modern, scalable, and performant web applications.

descriptions: Corporate website focused on digital presence and institutional communication.
Agribusiness platform focused on customer engagement and loyalty programs.
Creative agency website with modern design and interactive user experience.
Corporate website focused on information security solutions.
Website blog with articles and questions for students.

items.desc: Full-time, remote. Building and maintaining web products for the agency's clients.
Development and maintenance of a Clinical Research Management platform, contributing mainly to the front-end in React with Tailwind CSS. Remote.
Development and maintenance of web systems using JavaScript and React. Remote, full-time.
Support in the maintenance and development of web systems using JavaScript and PHP.

contact.headline: Let's build something great together.
contact.subtext: Open to freelance, full-time, and collaboration opportunities.
